note: Broad, well-bid advance with calm-to-moderate realised vol (orderly trend, not panic). Full deployment (regime multiplier 1.0) and a target-vol scalar near 1.0; run the full vol-targeted risk-parity book — six low-vol sleeves, the lowest-vol names at the 17% cap, small USDT reserve.

computed.regime_reason: breadth_pct 70 >= 65 AND median_24h_return 3.0 > 2 AND fear_greed 70 >= 60 -> breakout (broad, well-bid advance)

target_vol.reason: orderly trend: est_book_vol 0.50 modestly above target 0.45 -> scalar 0.45/0.50 = 0.90 (near-full deployment, never levered)

computed.gross_reason: gross = 100 * regime_multiplier 1.0 * target_vol_scalar 0.90 = 90; the full vol-targeted risk-parity book deploys, the lowest-vol names hit the 17% cap.

risk_weights.note: lowest vol -> largest sleeve, capped at 17%
highest vol of the set -> smallest sleeve so it contributes equal risk

computed.risk_weights_reason: inv_vol = 1/realised_vol; raw_parity_weight = inv_vol / Σ inv_vol (Σ inv_vol = 10.47). Each name's risk contribution (weight*vol) is equalised (risk parity). gross 90 distributes the parity weights; the two lowest-vol names hit the 17% cap, surplus rolls to USDT.
computed.reserve_reason: Six sleeves 17+17+15+13+10+8 = 80 deployed; the remaining 20 is the USDT reserve (small, full deployment in an orderly breakout).

entry: Run the full vol-targeted inverse-vol book (weight ∝ 1/realised_vol) across the lowest-vol eligible names; no directional score gate.
Full deployment in breakout/risk_on when vol is calm; the lowest-vol names hit the 17% cap, surplus rolls to USDT.
Cap gross at the no-leverage ceiling (target_vol_scalar <= 1.0) — never lever even in a strong tape.
exit: Rebalance toward parity when a name's realised_vol drifts > 20% relative or its sleeve drifts > 3% of NAV.
Scale the whole book down if realised vol spikes (est_book_vol > target); rotate the cut to USDT.
Trim any name above the 17% cap; exit any name that becomes ineligible.

actions.reason: lowest realised_vol 0.44 -> largest inverse-vol sleeve, capped at 17%
realised_vol 0.52 -> inverse-vol sleeve at the cap
highest realised_vol 1.00 -> smallest sleeve so it contributes equal risk
